# kCVImageBufferPixelAspectRatioVerticalSpacingKey

**Global Variable**

A key to the vertical component of the image buffer aspect ratio.

## Declaration

```swift
let kCVImageBufferPixelAspectRatioVerticalSpacingKey: CFString
```

## Discussion

The vertical spacing value is of type [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFNumber].

## Constants

- **kCVImageBufferPixelAspectRatioHorizontalSpacingKey**: A key to the horizontal component of the image buffer aspect ratio.
